subject: A specific finance angle
email_text:
James,

I saw that your remit at IBM centers on financial operations and capital allocation, which usually signals a sharp bias toward disciplined transformation rather than broad experimentation. That made me think there may be a useful angle in how senior operators frame enterprise change in CFO terms.

I work on executive positioning and outreach for leaders navigating high-stakes transitions. The strongest responses usually come when the message is anchored in a company's real operating priorities, not generic credentials.

If useful, I can send a very short note on the angle I think may be most relevant to your lens.

Best,
Rich Rothschild
